settings.heading: The world doesn't need more soap. It needs better soap.
settings.subtext: Most cleaning products are 90% water. We stripped everything back to just what works — then let you add the water yourself.

settings.label: Water shipped
settings.description: You add it at home — so we never have to

settings.heading: You add the water. We skip the shipping.
settings.body:
A concentrate contains only the active ingredients — the 10% that actually cleans. You add tap water at home into a reusable dispenser and get exactly the same result.

No shipping weight from water. No single-use bottle for every refill. No compromise on performance.
settings.stat_label: One bottle replaces up to ten conventional bottles

settings.heading: No Water Shipped
settings.body: Up to 90% of most cleaning products is water. We skip it entirely. You add tap water at home and get the same performance — without the weight, waste, or emissions from shipping liquid.

settings.heading: Naturally Gentle Formula
settings.body: No harsh sulfates, synthetic fragrances, or aggressive preservatives. Every ingredient earns its place — effective on the surface, kind on skin, and safe to go down the drain.

settings.heading: Recycled Plastic Only
settings.body: Every bottle we ship is made from post-consumer recycled plastic. We refuse to introduce new plastic into the world for something people use once and throw away.

settings.heading: Three things we will never compromise on.
Small changes. Measurable impact.
settings.body:
The beauty industry produces over 120 billion packaging units every year. Most of it is plastic. Most of it ends up in landfill.

We are not going to fix that alone. But if every product we make replaces ten single-use bottles, the math starts to matter.

settings.heading: Better for you. Better for the planet.
settings.subtext: Start with one product. You will not go back.
